---
title: "House Price Prediction Report"
output: html_document
params:
  prediction: "₹0"
  recommendation: "No recommendations provided."
  recommended_price: "₹0"
---

<style>
  body {
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    margin: 2em;
  }
  h1, h2 {
    color: #2C3E50;
  }
  .section {
    margin-bottom: 2em;
  }
  .price {
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #27AE60;
    font-weight: bold;
  }
</style>

# 🏠 House Price Prediction Report

## 📊 Prediction Summary

**Predicted Price:**  
<span class="price">`r params$prediction`</span>

---

## 🛠️ Recommendations

`r params$recommendation`

---

## 💰 Estimated Price After Recommendations

**Estimated Price:**  
<span class="price">`r params$recommended_price`</span>
